Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney'S Fees Pursuant To Civil Code 1717, Ccp1033.5 & Ccp685.040
Off Calendar Oct-31-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for post judgment attorneys fees is granted in the amount of $1350. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post-Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Aug-02-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection and produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
